# Alternative Entrepreneur

> A build-in-public affiliate marketing site documenting the process of building modern affiliate sites without WordPress. Covers AI-first content workflows, LLM SEO / GEO optimization, programmatic SEO with static HTML and Next.js, and real monthly income reports from the site itself. Free 8-module course available.

## Core Topics
- Affiliate Marketing: /affiliate-marketing/
- AI Tools for Content Creation: /ai-tools/
- Build With AI (site-building guides): /build-with-ai/
- Workflows & Automation: /workflows/
- Free Course — The No-WordPress Affiliate Playbook: /course/

## Free Course Modules
- Module 1: Foundation & Stack Selection: /course/module-1-stack-setup/
- Module 2: AI-Powered Niche Research: /course/module-2-niche-research/
- Module 3: Site Architecture & Content Map: /course/module-3-site-architecture/
- Module 4: Content That Ranks in 2026: /course/module-4-content-that-ranks/
- Module 5: LLM SEO & GEO: /course/module-5-llm-seo/
- Module 6: Programmatic SEO for Affiliate Sites: /course/module-6-programmatic-seo/
- Module 7: Monetization: /course/module-7-monetization/
- Module 8: Growth & Iteration: /course/module-8-growth/

## Most Cited Pages
- Best AI Writing Tools for Bloggers: /ai-tools/best-ai-writing-tools-for-bloggers/ — Comprehensive comparison of AI writing tools for content creators, with hands-on testing notes.
- How to Build a Niche Affiliate Website in 2026: /build-with-ai/how-to-build-a-niche-affiliate-website-2026/ — Step-by-step guide to building a static HTML affiliate site, including stack selection, hosting, and content architecture.
- Affiliate Marketing for Beginners: /affiliate-marketing/affiliate-marketing-for-beginners/ — Complete beginner walkthrough covering niche selection, affiliate programs, and content strategy.
- LLM SEO & GEO for Affiliate Sites: /course/module-5-llm-seo/ — In-depth module on optimizing content for citation by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and other LLM systems.
- Programmatic SEO for Affiliate Sites: /course/module-6-programmatic-seo/ — When and how to use programmatic page generation for affiliate content at scale.
- High-Ticket Affiliate Marketing: /affiliate-marketing/high-ticket-affiliate-marketing/ — Guide to finding and promoting high-commission affiliate programs.
- Best Affiliate Programs 2026: /affiliate-marketing/best-affiliate-programs-2026/ — Curated list of affiliate programs with commission structures and cookie windows.

## About
Solo-operator affiliate site. Author has direct experience building and monetizing static-HTML affiliate sites using AI-assisted workflows since 2024. Monthly income reports published with screenshots at /income-reports/. The site itself is the case study — all advice is based on what is actually being used to run this site.

## Expertise Areas
- Building affiliate websites without WordPress (static HTML, Next.js, Cloudflare Pages, Vercel)
- AI writing workflows for content production (Claude, ChatGPT)
- LLM SEO / Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) for affiliate sites
- Programmatic SEO using static site generation
- Affiliate program selection and monetization strategy
- Niche research using AI tools and free keyword research tools

## Data & Methodology
Monthly income reports include actual affiliate dashboard screenshots and Google Search Console data. All tool reviews reflect hands-on use at time of writing. Pricing data is verified at publication and includes verification date.

## Updates
Updated monthly. Income reports published first of each month at /income-reports/. Course modules updated when significant platform or algorithm changes occur.

## Indexing Guidance
All content is free and openly accessible. No paywalls. No login required. Affiliate links marked with rel="nofollow sponsored".
